title: Liminality
description: Adds New Dimensions to Explore, How Deep Can You Go?
body:
# Liminality  
<details>
<summary>Recommended Mods</summary> 

**Mods Recommended**  
[True Darkness Fabric Fork](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/true-darkness-fork-fabric/about)  
[LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)  
[Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps/versions)  
**Shaders used in gallery**  
[Insanity Shader (Used in gallery)](https://modrinth.com/shader/insanity-shader)  
</details>

This mod adds new 2 new dimensions to explore, the first one is the fields an infinite field  
this field has 2 structures, the cabin and the fields exit, the cabin has a diving suit which the player will 
 need, has a barrel full of loot, and has the glow orb a new light source which can be used to see underwater. The Fields Exit will generate much more rarely than the cabin and will lead to the next layer.  
Thalassophobia is a giant ocean where you will need to explore to find the exit to the next layer.  
So if you like exploring and a little bit of horror this mod is for you, one more thing...  
***How deep can you explore?***   

**Note** the next layer has not been implemented yet and will come with 1.0.1
